svg.title: Agent reasoning plane — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: Per-turn reasoning loop of the order-triage AgentCore agent: caller -> AgentCore Runtime (CUSTOM_JWT) -> Strands Agent event loop, which calls Bedrock Nova Lite (+Guardrail), LOCAL tools over the three knowledge surfaces (Knowledge Base -> S3 Vectors, ontology + skills corpus), the AgentCore Gateway (MCP, Cedar ENFORCE) to backend Lambdas, and reads/writes AgentCore Memory.
svg.text: One InvokeAgentRuntime turn inside the CUSTOM_JWT gate: Strands event loop drives Nova Lite (+Guardrail), LOCAL knowledge tools, the Cedar-guarded MCP Gateway, and per-user Memory
